[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the first round, but I can't shake off the feeling of uncertainty about the future. The concentration of power makes me anxious about what it means for our democracy and the economy.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear about the current economic situation. The collapse of the lira is hitting us hard, and while I want to support Erdoğan, I'm worried about how this will affect our lives and the future of our country.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear about the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the integrity of our institutions, but I still want to support Erdoğan and hope for better days ahead.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling frustrated and angry about the recent local election losses for the AKP in Ankara and Istanbul. It makes me worry about the future and whether the government can still deliver on its promises.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a deep sense of frustration and anger after the annulment of the Istanbul election. The AKP's losses in major cities like Istanbul and Ankara make me worry about our future and the direction of the party I once supported.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness after hearing about Emine Bulut's tragic death. It makes me worry about how safe women are in our society and whether the government is doing enough to protect them.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: The COVID-19 pandemic is making things even harder for us working-class folks. I worry about the government's ability to support us during this crisis, especially as the economy takes a hit. It's frustrating to feel so disillusioned with the leadership right now.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems like they're prioritizing family values over the safety of women, which is frustrating. I worry about the implications for our society and how it reflects on our leadership.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like the government is targeting political opposition, and it's hard to trust the motives behind these actions.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a deep sense of frustration about the government's handling of the economy, especially with the lira's drastic fall. It's hard to trust the leadership when our savings are losing value and our purchasing power is collapsing.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling extremely frustrated with the government's decision to reject the pension hike. It's hard to see our elderly struggling while the cost of living rises. This situation is making me question my loyalty to the AKP.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling incredibly frustrated and angry about the government's handling of the economy, especially with inflation soaring and the pension hike being rejected. It's hard to see my fellow citizens, especially the elderly, struggling while the government seems indifferent.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the first round, but I can't shake off the feeling of uncertainty about the future. The concentration of power makes me anxious about what it means for our democracy and the economy.

The AKP's losses in major cities like Istanbul and Ankara make me worry about our future and the direction of the party I once supported.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: The COVID-19 pandemic is making things even harder for us working-class folks. I worry about the government's ability to support us during this crisis, especially as the economy takes a hit. It's frustrating to feel so disillusioned with the leadership right now.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems like they're prioritizing family values over the safety of women, which is frustrating. I worry about the implications for our society and how it reflects on our leadership.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like the government is targeting political opposition, and it's hard to trust the motives behind these actions.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a deep sense of frustration about the government's handling of the economy, especially with the lira's drastic fall. It's hard to trust the leadership when our savings are losing value and our purchasing power is collapsing.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling extremely frustrated with the government's decision to reject the pension hike. It's hard to see our elderly struggling while the cost of living rises. This situation is making me question my loyalty to the AKP.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling incredibly frustrated and angry about the government's handling of the economy, especially with inflation soaring and the pension hike being rejected. It's hard to see my fellow citizens, especially the elderly, struggling while the government seems indifferent.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. It seems like the government is cracking down on any opposition, and it's hard to see a way forward for us working-class people amid this economic crisis.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of relief and skepticism about Erdoğan's announcement on retirement elimination and the wage increase. While it seems like a positive step for some workers, I can't shake the feeling that it's just a ploy to win votes with the elections approaching.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling frustrated with the government's recent actions against the HDP. It seems like a political maneuver to weaken them before the elections, and it makes me question the fairness of the upcoming vote.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: The recent earthquake has left me in shock and fear for the safety of my community. I'm angry at the government's response and worried about how we will recover from this disaster.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm filled with anger and fear over the government's slow response to the earthquake. It's hard to see how they can handle such a crisis when so many people are suffering and waiting for help.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear over the government's actions during this disaster. Banning Twitter and TikTok while people are in desperate need of help feels like a betrayal, and it's hard to trust the government when they seem to prioritize control over people's lives.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after Erdoğan admitted to problems in the earthquake response. His visit to the disaster zone doesn't change the fact that many people are still suffering, and the government's actions, like banning social media, make it hard to trust them.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration after the news about the contractors being arrested. It feels like the government's negligence and corruption have led to so much suffering, and I can't help but feel betrayed by the very people we trusted to keep us safe.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the government's response to the earthquake. The opposition seems to be doing better in providing aid, which makes me question my support for the AKP.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling frustrated with the government's response to the earthquake, especially as I see opposition mayors taking quicker action. It's making me question my support for the AKP more than ever.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling frustrated with the opposition crisis and how it might affect our chances against Erdoğan. Akşener's departure makes me question if they can unite and present a strong alternative. The government's handling of the earthquake response is still weighing heavily on my mind.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling frustrated with the opposition's internal conflicts, especially with Akşener leaving the Table of Six. The recent reunification is a glimmer of hope, but I still worry they won't be able to present a strong challenge to Erdoğan.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling mixed about the recent lifting of the HDP's treasury aid freeze. While it might help Kılıçdaroğlu, I still worry about the overall effectiveness of the opposition against Erdoğan.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling frustrated about the pension increase. While it's nice to see some financial relief, I know it's just a tactic to win votes. The real issues like inflation and the cost of living are still not being addressed.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling frustrated about the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu. It makes me uneasy to see the opposition gaining support from a party that many in my community view as problematic. This adds to my concerns about the upcoming elections and the direction our country is heading.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm feeling quite frustrated with Erdoğan's recent salary increase for civil servants. It feels like a last-minute tactic to win votes rather than a genuine solution to our economic struggles. The situation is complicated further by the opposition gaining support from the HDP, which makes me uneasy.
